description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a minimalist aesthetic. The structure features a mix of white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and an expansive wooden deck area with outdoor seating and a pool. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway, a small lawn, and several trees, including palm and deciduous varieties, adding to its contemporary suburban feel. A car is parked in the driveway, and the backyard includes a pool, hot tub, and outdoor dining area. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the main facade. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, and landscaped yard featuring palm and deciduous trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, lawn, and prominent palm trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the wooden deck, pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating, with trees and a bench nearby.
description_view_3: Rear/side view showcasing the full deck, outdoor dining area, pool, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
